prompt_text:
### Demographics: 56-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 3 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after preoperative labs showed elevated HbA1c
Current symptoms: Postprandial fatigue and thirst noted; no DKA/HHS signs; no recent hypoglycemia

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 4 (15-29)
Heart failure: HFrEF (NYHA Class II)
Body mass index category: Normal
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
Major Depressive Disorder
Osteoporosis (on bisphosphonate therapy)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 4 (15-29); HF: HFrEF (NYHA Class II); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Normal
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Current smoker (10 cigarettes/day for 5 years; ~2.5 pack-years); Alcohol 1-2 drinks/month

### Medication information
- Current medications: Linagliptin 5mg once daily; Sertraline (50 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily), Ciprofloxacin (500 mg twice daily for 7 days), Alendronate (70 mg weekly), Calcium Carbonate 500 Mg + Cholecalciferol 1000 Iu (daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 57.9 kg; Height 169.7 cm; BMI 20.1 kg/m²; Blood pressure 115/66 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 8.3%; 9 months ago 8.2%; 6 months ago 7.8%; 3 months ago 7.5%; current 7.9%), FPG (12 months ago 187mg/dL; 9 months ago 198mg/dL; 6 months ago 159mg/dL; 3 months ago 152mg/dL; current 168mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 57.7kg; 9 months ago 57.9kg; 6 months ago 58.2kg; 3 months ago 54.3kg; current 57.9kg), Height (12 months ago 169.7cm; 9 months ago 169.7cm; 6 months ago 169.7cm; 3 months ago 169.7cm; current 169.7cm), BMI (12 months ago 20.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 20.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 20.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 19.0kg/m²; current 20.1kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 120mmHg; 9 months ago 120mmHg; 6 months ago 120mmHg; 3 months ago 120mmHg; current 115mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 69mmHg; 9 months ago 69mmHg; 6 months ago 68mmHg; 3 months ago 68mmHg; current 66mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 31U/L; 9 months ago 39U/L; 6 months ago 29U/L; 3 months ago 38U/L; current 34U/L), AST (12 months ago 14U/L; 9 months ago 22U/L; 6 months ago 14U/L; 3 months ago 13U/L; current 18U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.0mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.0mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.9mg/dL; current 0.9mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 29mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 28mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 29mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 25mL/min/1.73m²; current 25mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 541mg/g; 9 months ago 505mg/g; 6 months ago 686mg/g; 3 months ago 518mg/g; current 860mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 80mg/dL; 9 months ago 83mg/dL; 6 months ago 83mg/dL; 3 months ago 84mg/dL; current 81mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 39mg/dL; 9 months ago 41mg/dL; 6 months ago 41mg/dL; 3 months ago 39mg/dL; current 40mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 139mg/dL; 9 months ago 125mg/dL; 6 months ago 136mg/dL; 3 months ago 142mg/dL; current 131mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 11.0g/dL; 9 months ago 11.0g/dL; 6 months ago 11.0g/dL; 3 months ago 10.2g/dL; current 9.9g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide 0.59 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
